supportEmails.subject: Your reservation with  Mirjam
supportEmails.body:
Dear Daniel, 


I hope this message finds you well.  

This is Florence from the Airbnb Trip Experience Team and I am happy in providing you and your Guest Mirjam with further information, regarding the reservation C49FN9 with you in  Colònia de Sant Jordi, Spain.

As you might already know I am writing you on behalf of your Guest Mirjam
who experienced some issues in your "Apartment in the South of Mallorca"  
As stated in the Airbnb Resolution center: https://www.airbnb.com/resolution_center/1212996

Mirjm informed us that the Apartment was not as described and advertised on Airbnb.  Please keep in mind that there are sometimes circumstances coming up that had a great affect on the travel plans of your Guests.  

Depending on the case, a refund may be authorized outside of the reservation's cancellation policy, as stated in our Guest Refund Policy: https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/544/guest-refund-policy?topic=250  

Could you please reply to this email and also provide us with further information, this information can help us develop a clearer understanding to expedite a solution for both of you.  

In the meantime, should you choose to volunteer a refund of 60 EUR for Mirjam, given the circumstances, please let us know please do so within the next 4 hours so that I  may provide additional assistance.  I am looking forward in hearing back from you.  

Warm regards and all the best, 


Florence
www.airbnb.com/help

supportEmails.subject: Your reservation with  Mirjam
supportEmails.body:
Hi Florence and thank you for your interest on this issue.

Not sure whether you had access to the response I provided to Mirjam this morning or not and also to the mail I sent only to Airbnb.

As you may notice I offered to Mirjam a refund just when she checked in but she never came back to me..., and now that I pointed out this topic she says that she did not understood she had to reply...

Anyway, for me the critical thing here is the status of the spot when they checked out. I am pretty sure they left the apartment such as dirty and disordered due to the issue they had at check in.

I do not have a problem on refunding the 60€ but I would like her to be fair on this. The spot probably had some hair and sand on the floor (my mistake!), but nothing compared on how they left the apartment.

I asked her this morning also which scale from 0-10 she thinks the apartment was dirty when checked in..., probably 8-9?

Looking forward to hear from you
daniel



Airbnb Customer Experience
-------------------------------

Actualizado por: Florence, 28 sept. 7:50 PDT:

Dear Daniel,

I hope this message finds you well.

This is Florence from the Airbnb Trip Experience Team and I am happy in providing you and your Guest Mirjam with further information, regarding the reservation C49FN9 with you in Colònia de Sant Jordi, Spain.

As you might already know I am writing you on behalf of your Guest Mirjam
who experienced some issues in your "Apartment in the South of Mallorca"
As stated in the Airbnb Resolution center: https://www.airbnb.com/resolution_center/1212996

Mirjm informed us that the Apartment was not as described and advertised on Airbnb. Please keep in mind that there are sometimes circumstances coming up that had a great affect on the travel plans of your Guests.

Depending on the case, a refund may be authorized outside of the reservation's cancellation policy, as stated in our Guest Refund Policy: https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/544/guest-refund-policy?topic=250

Could you please reply to this email and also provide us with further information, this information can help us develop a clearer understanding to expedite a solution for both of you.

In the meantime, should you choose to volunteer a refund of 60 EUR for Mirjam, given the circumstances, please let us know please do so within the next 4 hours so that I may provide additional assistance. I am looking forward in hearing back from you.

Warm regards and all the best,

Florence
www.airbnb.com/help

supportEmails.subject: Your reservation with  Mirjam
supportEmails.body:
Dear Daniel

thank you so much for the information. 

Unfortunaetly, I could not reach you on the phone number displ

I totally understand your point and I am sorry for all these difficulties. 

I know these situations can be frustrating so I'll try and make this process as easy as possible, I know that you are a great Host therfore I want to ask, if you want to go beyond and above and offer the requested refund of 60 EUR to to Mirjam :-) 

Please let me know in the respond to this email if I can assist you further, I am happy in helping you.

All the best wishes, 




Florence
www.airbnb.com/help

supportEmails.subject: Re: Your reservation with Mirjam
supportEmails.body:
Este es un seguimiento de su solicitud anterior n.° #16070362 "Your reservation with Mirjam"

Hola, ¿y cuál ha sido la conclusión de este tema?, ¿se le abonan los 60€ a Mirjam?, ¿lo paga Airbnb?

Gracias,



Airbnb Customer Experience

Mensaje automático del sistema.

Hola, Daniel:

Hace poco más de un día que Florence revisó tu caso. Si ha quedado resuelto, no tienes que hacer nada más.

Si sigues necesitando que Florence te atienda, contesta a este correo en un plazo de 24 horas. Una vez transcurrido este tiempo, tendrás que abrir un caso nuevo a través de nuestro Centro de ayuda (https://www.airbnb.es/help/) para ponerte en contacto con otro especialista.

Gracias,
El equipo de Airbnb

supportEmails.subject: Resolution Center #6211274 Escalated for Reservation2 #HMCM5XET3Z
supportEmails.body:
Hola Daniel,

Gracias por contactar con Airbnb. Mi nombre es Cristina y soy del Equipo de Viajes.

Acabo de recibir tu caso en el Centro de Resoluciones con Gordon (HMCM5XET3Z).

Hemos estado revisando y vemos que se ha cobrado tu tarifa de limpieza de 60€ en la reserva con Gordon, el hecho de que haya habido una modificación de fechas no influye en la tarifa de limpieza, a no ser que hayas modificado manualmente el subtotal, pero si solo fue cambio de fechas no afecta.

Cuando envías ofertas especiales es cuando debes añadirlo en la oferta, pero si la reserva ya ha sido confirmada con la tarifa de limpieza y después se cambian las fechas la limpieza se mantiene y lo que puede variar es el precio de las noches en función de tus precios en el calendario.

Pero en definitiva la tarifa fue cobrada y se incluye el pago enviado.

Espero haber aclarado tus dudas y si tienes alguna duda más no dudes en consultarme.

Saludos,




Cristina
www.airbnb.com/help

supportEmails.subject: Airbnb Customer Service
supportEmails.body:
Hello Daniel,

Thank you for taking my call, it was a pleasure speaking with you. I hope I was able to provide you with what you needed to know about . I'll close out this thread within the next 24 hours. However, If you come across any other questions or concerns, just let us know! Thanks for being a valuable member of the Airbnb community. We also have a Help Center to serve you at www.airbnb.com/help

Kind regards. 

Gretchen
www.airbnb.com/help

supportEmails.subject: Airbnb Customer Service
supportEmails.body:
Hola Daniel,

Gracias por ponerte en contacto con nosotros! Soy Marie, embajadora de Atención al Cliente de Airbnb, y me encargaré de tu caso en relación con la ubicación de tu anuncio.

Entiendo que cuando lo viste a través del mapa es un poco inexacto. Gracias por dejarnos saber esto.

Como hemos hablado, por favor permíteme al menos 24 horas para comprobarlo por ti, pero al comprobarlo ahora, muestra que necesitas actualizar la dirección de tu alojamiento. Podemos hacer un cambio en tu dirección: ¡no debería suponer ningún problema una vez que me ayudes con algunos detalles!

En primer lugar, necesitaremos las coordenadas GPS decimales de tu anuncio. Si no estás seguro de cuáles son, puedes encontrarlos en:

latlong.net

Una vez que lo tengas, responde a este mensaje para informarnos de la siguiente información:

1. Coordenadas GPS de latitud y longitud (copia el formulario decimal y no los grados/minutos/segundos).
2. Número de apartamento o casa.
3. Nombre de la calle.
4. Ciudad.
5. Estado, provincia o región.
6. Código postal o postal.
7. País.

En tu respuesta, confirma también que el anuncio desde el que hospedas no ha cambiado.

Buscando tu respuesta. ¡Gracias!

-------------------------------

Hi Daniel, 

Thanks for reaching out to us! This is Marie, an Airbnb Resolutions Support Ambassador, and I will be working on your case regarding your listing's location. 

I understand that when you saw it via map, it's a bit inaccurate. Thanks for letting us know about this. 

As discussed, please allow me at least 24 hours to check on this for you, but upon checking it now, it shows that you need to update your listing’s address. We can make a change to your address—this shouldn’t be a problem once you help me with a few details!

First, we’ll need the decimal GPS coordinates for your listing. If you’re not sure what these are, you can find them at:
 
latlong.net

Once you’ve got these, please reply to this message, letting us know the following information:

1. Latitude and longitude GPS coordinates (please copy the decimal form, and not the degrees/minutes/seconds). 
2. Apartment or house number.
3. Street name. 
4. City. 
5. State, province or region.
6. Zip or postal code. 
7. Country. 

In your reply, please also confirm that the listing you’re hosting from hasn’t changed.

Looking for ward to your response. Thank you!

supportEmails.subject: Airbnb customer support
supportEmails.content:
https://www.airbnb.cat/?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=

Benvolgut Daniel,
Espero que aquest missatge us trobi bé.

Us parlo d'aquesta reserva: HMX5BA92HM
Amb la teva convidada Angelika.

Ella es va posar en contacte amb nosaltres per fer-nos saber
que hi ha un soroll de construcció, que us van preguntar al
respecte abans de començar la reserva.

I ha compartit vídeos amb nosaltres per demostrar-ho.

Vull informar-vos que li donarem el 30% de les nits
afectades, que són 2 dies, perquè sortiran demà, a la
convidada.
El que equival a 31,8 €
Això es deu al fet que considerem que la precisió de les
llistes és una cosa realment important.

A més, volen marxar, així que segons la nostra política
modificaré les dates de reserva per poder fer la sortida
demà.
Això vol dir que rebrà un reemborsament complet dels dies no
gastats i un 30% del gastat.
Aquest és el vostre pagament total després de la
modificació: 119 €

Aquesta també és una de les regles bàsiques per als
amfitrions d'Airbnb.
Exigim als amfitrions que segueixin les nostres normes en
aquestes àrees, que ajuden a crear estades còmodes i fiables
per als hostes:
- Compromís de reserva
- Comunicació oportuna
- Exactitud dels llistats
- Neteja de llistes

https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/2895

Salutacions cordials

ATENCIÓ AL CLIENT D'AIRBNB

Visita el Centre d'ajuda
[https://www.airbnb.cat/help?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=]

Contactar amb Airbnb
[https://www.airbnb.cat/help/contact_us?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=]

   https://www.airbnb.cat/external_link?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fairbnb   https://www.airbnb.cat/external_link?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fairbnb   https://www.airbnb.cat/external_link?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=&url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FAirbnb

supportEmails.subject: Airbnb customer support
supportEmails.content:
https://www.airbnb.cat/?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=

Hi Daniel,

I'm Sayed G. with Airbnb and I help to support our Host
community I hope you’re doing well!


Talking to you about this reservation code : HMXZ94S2YW
The guest Ute Oberdick contacted us and wanted to edit the
review, but unfortunately we can't edit the review after
it's published, we can only edit the review before it's
published.
if you submit your review first, you may edit it anytime
within the 14-day review period, up until the other party
submits their review. Once both reviews are submitted or the
14-day review period has ended—whichever comes first—both
reviews are automatically published and no more changes can
be made. Find out how reviews work for stays.
And the review has already been published, unfortunately we
can't edit it.
But don't worry, I suggested to him that we can delete it
permanently so that it doesn't hurt you.
She agreed and I have now deleted the guest review.

for more information :
https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/367?locale=en

I'm glad I was able to help out. we're lucky to have you as
a Host in our community!

Don't hesitate to let me know if you have any other
questions.

Best Regards

ATENCIÓ AL CLIENT D'AIRBNB

Visita el Centre d'ajuda
[https://www.airbnb.cat/help?c=.pi80.pkc3VwX2FnZW50X3BsYXRmb3JtL2Nhc2VzX2N1c3RvbWVyX3N1cHBvcnQ=&euid=]
